paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 137 — we need to reverse this today. Well below the 7-day average of 178 — the team is making real progress. 42 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 1 task should be active but is stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention.

**Ginger Brown:** The oldest overdue task is 39 days past due with 32 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **8 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $36,824 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** The oldest overdue task is 11 days past due with 29 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **20 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 3 payment tasks due this week.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 51 days past due with 26 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **33 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $59,378 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** The oldest overdue task is 18 days past due with 15 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **59 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $20,517 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Charles Harris — Argyle TX:** The oldest overdue task is 27 days past due with 12 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **17 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 10 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **34 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.

**Shaan Lagisetty (CNG-20251169):** The oldest overdue task is 13 days past due with 6 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **11 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $10,497 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** Overdue count is climbing — now at 3. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **15 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $34,983 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 2 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **16 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 8 payment tasks due this week.
**Karim-Merchant:** **21 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.
**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** **31 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $18,243 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.
**Giselle Garcia:** Carrying 40 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.
**Angel Pacheco:** Carrying 20 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.

298 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **265 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 36 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$125,525 in payments going out this week** across 52 tasks — make sure funds are available. $72,266 expected in from 8 client payments. Heavy week ahead for Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458) and Kyle Aubry - Project 01 — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco's overdue has been growing over the past few days — now at 20. This needs to turn around today.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 15 overdue (oldest: 18d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **59 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 72 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 3 overdue — oldest first. **15 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 16 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 2 overdue — oldest first. **16 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 22 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Giselle Garcia: Giselle Garcia's overdue has been growing over the past few days — now at 40. This needs to turn around today.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** 29 overdue (oldest: 11d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **20 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 20 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 10 overdue — oldest first. **34 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 41 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Karim-Merchant:** 1 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **21 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 21 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Jeff: Jeff is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 27. Keep the momentum going.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 26 overdue (oldest: 51d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **33 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 36 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** **31 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 31 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Jonas De Cardenas: Jonas De Cardenas is completely clean — no overdue tasks. Keep this up.
Milagros Porturas: Milagros Porturas is carrying 32 overdue, higher than their recent average. Time to clear the backlog.

**Ginger Brown:** 32 overdue (oldest: 39d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **8 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 11 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
